subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which Thou hast subdued all who are in the heavens and on earth, to preserve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به سخرت من فی السموات و الارض بان تحفظ
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
